description.zh: 场景生成器(工作台)· 基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点图编程:用节点管线 + 模板生成游戏场景,复用游戏纹理库,多层渲染器预览(分层 / 视图模式),截图与对外发布。
description.en: Scene Generator workbench — node-graph programming on @forgeax/node-runtime: build game scenes through a node pipeline + templates, reuse the game's texture library, preview in a layered renderer (layers / view modes), capture screenshots and publish externally.

description.zh: 列出 Scene Generator 项目
description.en: List Scene Generator projects

description.zh: 创建 Scene Generator 项目
description.en: Create a Scene Generator project

description.zh: 打开/激活指定 Scene Generator 项目（获得独占锁；一个 agent 同一时刻只能持有一个项目）
description.en: Open/activate a Scene Generator project (acquires an exclusive lock; one agent holds at most one project at a time)

description.zh: 关闭/释放对指定 Scene Generator 项目的独占锁；释放后才能打开另一个项目
description.en: Close/release the exclusive lock on a Scene Generator project; required before opening another

confirmMessage.zh: 删除 Scene Generator 项目需要确认
confirmMessage.en: Deleting a Scene Generator project requires confirmation

description.zh: 删除指定 Scene Generator 项目
description.en: Remove a Scene Generator project

description.zh: 列出已注册 scene 电池/ops
description.en: List registered scene batteries/ops

description.zh: 读取单个 scene 电池/op 定义
description.en: Get one scene battery/op definition

description.zh: 列出可实例化的模板组（6 个预制场景模板组 + 已保存的成组电池），含 id / name / category。用它发现模板组——batteries.get 查不到模板组（那查的是静态 op）。
description.en: List instantiable group templates (the 6 prebuilt scene template groups + saved group batteries) with id / name / category. Use this to discover template groups — batteries.get cannot find them (it lists static ops only).

returns.description: 完整 NodeGroup 定义（nodes/edges/exposedInputs/exposedOutputs/_nestedGroups）；exposedInputs/exposedOutputs 的 portName 即对外 in_N/out_N 端口 / Full NodeGroup definition; exposedInputs/exposedOutputs portName are the outward in_N/out_N ports

description.zh: 读取一个模板组的完整定义（含 exposedInputs/exposedOutputs，即 in_N/out_N 对外端口及类型）。实例化前用它核对端口契约。
description.en: Get one group template's full definition (incl. exposedInputs/exposedOutputs — the outward in_N/out_N ports and their types). Use before instantiating to verify the port contract.

templateId.description: 模板组 id 或文件 basename（如 LakeRegions） / template group id or file basename (e.g. LakeRegions)

position.description: 顶层组影子节点的画布坐标 / canvas position of the top-level group shadow node

groupId.description: 可选：给顶层组一个稳定句柄（= 顶层影子节点 id）；省略则自动生成且不冲突 / optional stable handle for the top-level group (= its shadow node id); omitted → auto-generated, collision-free

opts.description: actor 透传到历史记录（如 ai:sino）；label 为历史面板可读标签 / actor forwarded to history (e.g. ai:sino); label is a human-readable history row

groupId.description: 新建顶层组的影子节点 id（接线时作为 nodeId 用）/ shadow node id of the new top-level group (use as nodeId when wiring)

exposedInputs.description: 对外输入端口清单 [{portName:in_N, portType}] / outward input ports

exposedOutputs.description: 对外输出端口清单 [{portName:out_N, portType}] / outward output ports

description.zh: 一步把模板组实例化进当前活动项目的图：自动重映射内部 node/edge/group id（同一模板可重复实例化不冲突），落地为一个 __group__ 顶层组节点（含嵌套子组），并返回新组的 groupId 与稳定 in_N/out_N 端口清单供接线。优先用它替代手工 createNode+connect+createGroup 展开。
description.en: Instantiate a template group into the active project's graph in one call: inner node/edge/group ids are remapped (same template can be instantiated repeatedly without collision), materialised as one __group__ top-level node (incl. nested sub-groups), returning the new groupId and stable in_N/out_N exposed ports for wiring. Prefer this over manual createNode+connect+createGroup expansion.

description.zh: 读取当前 scene pipeline graph
description.en: Read the active scene pipeline graph

description.zh: 批量修改 scene pipeline graph
description.en: Apply a batch of scene pipeline graph edits

raw.description: 默认 false：只返回轻量摘要（status + 各节点端口的 children 名/cell 数等），可放心整图 execute 看摘要验证每组是否产出。仅在极少数需要原始全量 voxel cells 时传 true（体积巨大，会撑爆上下文）。

description.zh: 执行当前 scene pipeline 或指定节点；默认返回轻量摘要（status + 各端口 children 名/cell 数），raw:true 才返回全量
description.en: Execute the active scene pipeline or a single node; returns a lightweight summary by default (status + per-port child names / cell counts), pass raw:true for the full result

description.zh: 导入/替换 scene pipeline graph
description.en: Import or replace a scene pipeline graph

description.zh: 导出当前 scene pipeline 模板
description.en: Export the current scene pipeline template

description.zh: 列出 scene 项目文件系统素材（<workspaceRoot>/assets，非私有库；查发布进库的私有资产用 scene:library.list）
description.en: List scene project filesystem assets (<workspaceRoot>/assets — NOT the private library; use scene:library.list to see published private assets)

description.zh: 列出资产库（内置 ∪ 当前项目私有，分页，私有优先）。默认 zone=raw。这是 agent 唯一能看到/核对 publishExternal 发布结果的途径（scene:assets.list 查的是文件系统素材、看不到私有库）。
description.en: List the asset library (base ∪ active-project private, paginated, private first). Defaults to zone=raw. This is the ONLY way an agent can see/verify what scene:library.publishExternal landed (scene:assets.list lists filesystem assets, not the private library).

gameSlug.description: 目标游戏 slug（绑定 <projectRoot>/.forgeax/games/<gameSlug>/textures/ 作为资产源）

projectRoot.description: 场景侧 host 项目根（默认=本工具 cwd）。返回 dir 供反推后传给 asset2d:publishToGame 的 projectRoot。

description.zh: 把共享游戏沙箱 <projectRoot>/.forgeax/games/<gameSlug>/textures/ 绑定为资产源。跨 workbench 发布时**先调本工具**（返回 dir），从 dir 反推 projectRoot 再传给 asset2d:publishToGame——两 workbench 默认 cwd 不同，顺序反了会落错目录、library.list 搜不到。绑定后广播 library:changed。
description.en: Bind the shared game sandbox <projectRoot>/.forgeax/games/<gameSlug>/textures/ as an asset source. When publishing across workbenches, call this FIRST (returns dir), derive projectRoot from dir, then pass the same projectRoot to asset2d:publishToGame — the two workbench default cwds differ; reversing the order lands bytes where the scene can't read them. Broadcasts library:changed on bind.

assetName.description: field4 语义名 / item-name the renderer matches on

from2dAlias.description: ★推荐：2D 生成资产的 alias（asset2d:assets.list/getBytes 返回的那个）。发布桥会 server-to-server 取字节，agent 不必、也不要传 base64。

from2dBlobId.description: 可选：2D 资产 blobId（同时作 sourceBlobId 幂等键）；from2dAlias 优先。

dataBase64.description: （回退用）base64 PNG 字节。优先用 from2dAlias 让发布桥自取——base64 经上下文会被自动压缩丢弃、引发发布死循环。

autotileKind.description: autotile rule alias, required for tile (e.g. common_16)

sourceBlobId.description: provenance / idempotency key（给了 from2dBlobId 会自动填）

description.zh: 【已退役为兼容回退，新任务请用 asset2d:publishToGame + scene:library.useGameTextures 走共享沙箱】贴图发布桥：把 2D 生成的 PNG 发布进当前场景项目私有 raw 库（合成 renderer alias、tile 绑定 autotile 规则、记录 provenance、幂等）。如仍用：只传 from2dAlias（+tile 的 autotileKind）让桥 server-to-server 自取字节；别把 base64 塞进上下文（会被压缩丢失→死循环）。
description.en: [LEGACY fallback — new work should use asset2d:publishToGame + scene:library.useGameTextures (shared sandbox)] Texture publish bridge: publish a 2D-generated PNG into the active scene project's private raw library. If still used: pass from2dAlias (+autotileKind for tiles) so the bridge fetches bytes server-to-server; NEVER push base64 through the agent context (it gets compacted away → publish loops).

path.description: 保存到磁盘的 PNG 绝对路径；用 read_file 打开它来查看图像 / absolute path of the saved PNG; open it with read_file to view the image

description.zh: 请求渲染器截图：把 PNG 存到磁盘并返回其绝对路径（不内联 base64，避免撑爆上下文）。要查看图像，用 read_file 打开返回的 path。
description.en: Request a renderer screenshot: saves the PNG to disk and returns its absolute path (no inline base64 — avoids blowing up the context window). To view the image, open the returned path with read_file.

path.description: 保存到磁盘的 PNG 绝对路径；用 read_file 打开它来查看图像 / absolute path of the saved PNG; open it with read_file to view the image

description.zh: 读取最近一次 scene 预览截图：把 PNG 存到磁盘并返回其绝对路径（不内联 base64）。要查看图像，用 read_file 打开返回的 path。
description.en: Read the latest scene preview screenshot: saves the PNG to disk and returns its absolute path (no inline base64). To view the image, open the returned path with read_file.

description.zh: 渲染器回写截图数据（内部）
description.en: Renderer callback to store screenshot data

description.zh: 读取 scene 渲染器控制能力
description.en: Read scene renderer control capabilities

description.zh: 设置 scene 预览视角
description.en: Set the scene preview view mode

description.zh: 选择 scene 预览层
description.en: Select a scene preview layer

description.zh: 展开 scene 预览子层
description.en: Open scene preview sub-layers
